boonCookieDescription: Earn $1 at end of round. Increases by $2 when a Boss is defeated
boonAllinDescription: Adds X4 Mult on final move of round
boonOffgridDescription: Adiciona <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Points</point> no fim de cada jogada (um ponto por célula)
boonClickbaitDescription: Adiciona <multi>+2 Multi</multi> por cada reroll da loja nesta run (atualmente <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Multi</multi>)
